description_long: This is a sleek, modern coupe car with a low, aerodynamic profile and a prominent rear spoiler, suggesting a sporty design. The body is finished in a matte gray color, with blacked-out windows and red-accented wheels that add a touch of aggression. The car features smooth, flowing lines along the sides, a sculpted hood, and compact proportions typical of high-performance coupes. The front end is characterized by rounded headlights and a subtle grille, while the rear showcases dual exhausts and a distinctive taillight arrangement. The wheels are large and multi-spoked, hinting at performance-oriented engineering. The car sits on a circular section of asphalt, simulating an urban street environment.
description: A matte gray, sporty coupe car with a rear spoiler, blacked-out windows, and red-accented wheels, exuding a modern and aggressive appearance.
description_view_0: Rear three-quarter view showing the rear spoiler, taillights, and dual exhausts.
description_view_1: Side-rear view highlighting the coupe's sloping roofline, side profile, and wheel design.
description_view_2: Front three-quarter view displaying the rounded headlights, sculpted hood, and front bumper.
description_view_3: Side-front view emphasizing the car's aerodynamic lines, front fender, and wheel details.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
